title: Creating a SB_LUT4 with unconnected inputs causes a C++ exception

features.name: cell instantiation with unconnected port connections
features.description: Code should include a cell instantiation where some input ports are explicitly left unconnected using empty port connection syntax .PORT_NAME()

features.name: technology-specific LUT primitive with parameter initialization
features.description: Code should include instantiation of a technology-mapped LUT primitive (SB_LUT4) with a 16-bit LUT_INIT parameter specifying the truth table
